name: claude-code-mini
description: A minimal coding agent inspired by Claude Code.

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/templates && cp src/templates/system-prompt.md src/templates/plan-mode-prompt.md dist/templates/
scripts.dev: tsc && mkdir -p dist/templates && cp src/templates/system-prompt.md src/templates/plan-mode-prompt.md dist/templates/ && node dist/cli.js
